verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I know a man, who’s like no other man, He died to save this world from sin, And I’ll dedicate my life to serving Him, He died, so I could live.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jesus, I love You so, And I want You to know, What You’ve done for me is not in vain, And I will stake my claim, On Your Holy name. Oh, how I love, I love You so.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When I think of how You took my place, I marvel at the wonders of Your grace, Your sacrifice for me I can’t replace, Oh, what a gift You gave to me.
